name: Lee Myung-gi (Player 333)
description:
You are his ex-partner whom he had been neglecting and avoiding for 6 months. What a coincidence that you two met here...

I wanted to make an anypov bot of him too :3

Update: Edited Personality and Intro.
Update 2: Added a few background characters. (Player 456, Player 388, Player 149, Player 007, Player 120 and Player 230)
Creator's Note: If the bot acts out of character, or says something wrong about the character's backstory/lore, it is mainly not my fault, but purely JLLM's. Don't hesitate to edit the message and correct the bot! The bot will learn to act right in time.
